---
pagetitle: "RC42 Members Directory"
description: "Public directory of ISA RC42 Social Psychology members."
toc: false
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
---

::: {.members-directory-page}

::: {.members-directory-hero}
```{=html}
<canvas class="members-network-canvas" id="networkCanvas"></canvas>
```
::: {.section-inner}

::: {.header-content}
[MEMBERSHIP NETWORK]{.hero-kicker}

# RC42 Members Directory

[Explore the international network of scholars affiliated with ISA RC42 Social Psychology.]{.hero-description}
:::

::: {.directory-stats}
::: {.directory-stat}
[--]{#stat-total .stat-value}
[Members]{.stat-label}
:::

::: {.directory-stat}
[--]{#stat-countries .stat-value}
[Countries]{.stat-label}
:::

::: {.directory-stat}
[--]{#stat-institutions .stat-value}
[Institutions]{.stat-label}
:::

::: {.directory-stat}
[--]{#stat-updated .stat-value}
[Last updated]{.stat-label}
:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.section-inner}

```{=html}
<style>
.members-accordion {
  max-width: 1180px;
  margin: 2.5rem auto 4rem;
}
.members-accordion-panel {
  border: 1px solid #DDE5E8;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: #FFFFFF;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.04);
}
.members-accordion-trigger {
  width: 100%;
  border: 0;
  background: #F8FAFC;
  padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto auto;
  gap: 1rem;
  align-items: center;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.members-accordion-trigger:hover {
  background: #F4F7F8;
}
.members-accordion-kicker {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  color: #009688;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}
.members-accordion-title {
  display: block;
  color: #17233A;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
}
.members-accordion-description {
  display: block;
  color: #64748B;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  margin-top: 0.2rem;
}
.members-accordion-count {
  color: #009688;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.members-accordion-icon {
  color: #17233A;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  transition: transform 0.2s ease;
}
.members-accordion-panel.is-open .members-accordion-icon {
  transform: rotate(180deg);
}
.members-accordion-content {
  padding: 1.75rem 1.5rem;
  background: #FFFFFF;
}
.past-members-grid {
  columns: 4 220px;
  column-gap: 2.25rem;
}
.past-member-item {
  break-inside: avoid;
  margin-bottom: 1.1rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.85rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(221, 229, 232, 0.7);
}
.past-member-name {
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: #17233A;
  line-height: 1.35;
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
}
.past-member-meta {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: #64748B;
  line-height: 1.4;
}
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .past-members-grid {
    columns: 2 200px;
  }
}
@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .members-accordion-trigger {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
  }
  .members-accordion-count {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
  }
  .members-accordion-content {
    padding: 1rem;
  }
}
@media (max-width: 500px) {
  .past-members-grid {
    columns: 1;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="members-accordion">
  <section class="members-accordion-panel is-open" id="current-members-panel">
    <button class="members-accordion-trigger" type="button" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="current-members-content">
      <span>
        <span class="members-accordion-kicker">Active directory</span>
        <span class="members-accordion-title">Current RC42 Members</span>
        <span class="members-accordion-description">Browse current members affiliated with ISA RC42 Social Psychology.</span>
      </span>
      <span class="members-accordion-count" id="current-members-accordion-count">-- members</span>
      <span class="members-accordion-icon" aria-hidden="true">⌄</span>
    </button>

    <div class="members-accordion-content" id="current-members-content">
      <div class="members-toolbar">
        <div class="toolbar-search">
          <label for="member-search" class="visually-hidden">Search members</label>
          <input type="text" id="member-search" placeholder="Search by name, institution, or country..." />
        </div>
        <div class="toolbar-filters">
          <label for="country-filter" class="visually-hidden">Filter by country</label>
          <select id="country-filter">
            <option value="">All Countries</option>
          </select>

          <button id="clear-filters" class="btn-clear-filters">Clear filters</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="members-results-info">
        Showing <span id="results-count">--</span> of <span id="total-count">--</span> members
      </div>

      <div id="no-results" class="members-empty-state" style="display: none;">
        No members match the current filters.
      </div>

      <div id="members-grid" class="members-grid">
        <!-- JavaScript will inject member rows here -->
      </div>

      <div class="members-privacy-note">
        <div class="privacy-actions"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="members-accordion-panel" id="past-members-panel">
    <button class="members-accordion-trigger" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="past-members-content">
      <span>
        <span class="members-accordion-kicker">Historical directory</span>
        <span class="members-accordion-title">Past RC42 Members</span>
        <span class="members-accordion-description">A historical listing of scholars who have been affiliated with ISA RC42 Social Psychology.</span>
      </span>
      <span class="members-accordion-count" id="past-members-accordion-count">-- past members</span>
      <span class="members-accordion-icon" aria-hidden="true">⌄</span>
    </button>

    <div class="members-accordion-content" id="past-members-content" hidden>
      <div id="past-members-list" class="past-members-grid"></div>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>
```

:::

:::

```{=html}
<script src="../assets/js/members-directory.js"></script>
<script src="../assets/js/members-network-bg.js"></script>
```
